summary: The selector `button:has-text('Submit')` failed because the button text changed from 'Submit' to 'Send' in the latest UI update. The healing engine attempted contract-based selectors first, then cache-based alternatives, but none matched the new UI state.
recommendations: Add stable data-testid='checkout-submit-button' to the submit button
Update automation contract to use data-testid instead of text-based selector
Consider using aria-label for accessible and stable selection
